history.text: Emirate of Diriyah ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
Emirate of Nejd ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
Emirate of Riyadh ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
Emirate of Nejd and Hasa ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
Sultanate of Nejd ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
The Kingdom of Hejaz and Nejd emerged, giving the area a defined monarchical state structure.
Unification and Proclamation of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
The current constitution came into force, setting the basic framework for today's Saudi Arabia.

worthSeeing.title: Mecca & Medina:
worthSeeing.text: The two holiest cities of Islam, the destination of the Hajj pilgrimage for 1.8 billion Muslims.

worthSeeing.title: Al-Ula:
worthSeeing.text: Ancient Nabataean ruins of Hegra, dramatic rose-red rock formations, and an emerging arts scene.

worthSeeing.title: Jeddah Old Town:
worthSeeing.text: UNESCO-listed historic centre with coral-stone buildings and vibrant Red Sea waterfront.

planningQuestions.q: What is Saudi Arabia known for?
planningQuestions.a: Mecca & Medina, Al-Ula, Jeddah Old Town.

planningQuestions.q: How should I browse it here?
planningQuestions.a: Start with the facts, jump to linked cities, then check events and topics.
